lang.chooseSubtitle: You can change this anytime. We never translate what you or others write.

lang.privacyNote: Profile text and chat stay in the language people wrote them in.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to pick up your chats and discover new people.
auth.emailOrPhoneHint: Use the same email or Japan mobile you used to register. Phone sign-in only works if you signed up with a phone number (any common format is fine).
auth.validationLoginId: Enter your email or phone number.
auth.errorGeneric: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.methodError: Go back and choose Email or Phone.
register.methodIntro: Sign up with your Japan phone number. You can add an email later (optional). We’ll text you a code.

postSend.email: Check your inbox (and spam). The code is sent by email when SMTP is configured.
postSend.phone: Check your phone for a text message. If SMS isn’t configured yet, your server may log the code instead.

contact.optionalEmailHint: Add an email for receipts and account recovery. You sign in with your phone number (or this email if you add it).
contact.hintPhone: We’ll send a 6-digit code by SMS to this number (Twilio when configured). You can use a dev OTP from server logs if SMS isn’t set up yet.
contact.hintEmail: We’ll send a 6-digit code by email when SMTP is configured. Otherwise check server logs or use a configured dev OTP.

nickname.label: Nickname
nickname.description: This is the name shown on your profile and to other members.

legal.tos: I agree to the Terms of Service
legal.privacy: I agree to the Privacy Policy

photos.intro: Add at least one clear photo. The first photo is your main profile picture. This is the last step — then your account is created.

error.imagesOnly: Please choose image files only (JPEG, PNG, WebP, etc.).
error.photoTooLarge: Each photo must be 5 MB or smaller.

error.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
error.addOnePhoto: Add at least one profile photo to continue.
error.heightRange: Enter a valid height between 120 and 230 cm.
error.completeBasics: Please complete relationship intention, drinking, smoking, and living situation.

empty.limitedBefore: Strong discovery filters (distance, age, modes, or deal-breakers) may be hiding everyone. Loosen filters in
empty.default: Passes and likes clear from this list. Check back later or refresh.

header.subtitle: Swipe-style matching — pass, like, or super like
header.subtitleBeginner: ✕ skip · ♥ Like · ★ Super Like — tap ? for help
header.radiusWithLocation: Within ~{{km}} km — adjust with the filter button
header.radiusNoLocation: ~{{km}} km selected — add your location in Discovery settings for this to apply

card.teaserNext: Say hi and see where it goes.
card.teaserCurrent: Excited to meet people and create great stories.

detail.sparseProfile: They haven’t added much yet — start a chat after you match to learn more.

settings.title: Discovery settings
settings.leadShow: Control which people appear in Discover. Stricter filters mean fewer profiles — you can loosen distance or age when you run out (below).
settings.leadMy: These details let other people filter fairly — add what you’re comfortable sharing.
settings.modesHint: Others choose modes they want to appear in on the My profile tab.
settings.interestedInHint: Leave all off to include every gender.
settings.expandDistance: Show people further away if I run out of nearby profiles
settings.expandAge: Show people slightly outside my age range if I run out
settings.narrowHint: Only people who match these (they fill details on My profile). Leave “Any” to skip.
settings.positionOk: Saved — needed for distance sorting and filters.
settings.positionWarn: Add your position to use distance limits accurately.
settings.geoNotSupported: Location is not supported in this browser.
settings.geoPermission: Could not read your location. Check browser permissions.

matches.title: Messages
matches.subtitle: Chats with people you matched with
matches.emptyBody: When you match with someone on Discover, they will show up here.

likes.title: Likes
likes.introLine2: “Liked you” is people who liked you on Discover first—like them back here to match in one tap.
likes.introLine3: “You liked” is people you liked first; when they like you back, you will connect under Messages.
likes.emptyInboundTitle: No one has liked you yet
likes.emptyInboundBody: When someone likes you on Discover before you like them, they appear here so you can like back and match.
likes.emptyOutboundBody: Tap the heart on Discover to show interest. People you liked stay here until you match or they like you back.
likes.statusSuperWaiting: Super like sent — waiting on them
likes.toastLikeSent: Like sent — if they like you too, you will match.
likes.freeUpgradeBody: Upgrade to Plus or Gold to see who liked you.
likes.lockedPreviewHint: Preview only — identities are hidden on the Free plan.
likes.goldTeaser: Gold: priority visibility and more perks for your likes.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: Up to {{max}} photos — shown on your profile and in Discover.
photos.errorMaxPhotos: You already have {{max}} photos. Remove one before adding another.

profile.aiTipsHint: Uses your Profile AI daily quota (separate from chat reply ideas) when the model is configured.
profile.quotaExhausted: Daily AI coach limit reached. Try tomorrow or go Premium.
profile.geoPositionHelp: Sharing your position helps show approximate distance to others in Discover.
profile.geoNotSupported: Location is not supported in this browser.
profile.geoPermissionDenied: Could not read your location. Check browser permissions.
profile.missingProfileHint: Try signing in again or create a new account.
profile.deleteHint: Type your account email to confirm.
profile.pwdTooShort: New password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.deleteEmailMismatch: Type your email exactly to confirm deletion.
profile.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete your account and all data? This cannot be undone.
profile.pushHint: Registered devices: {{count}}. Enable for match and message alerts.

safety.blockedLead: Blocked people are hidden from Discover and cannot message you.
safety.reportsLead: Reports are reviewed by our team. Status updates may take time.
safety.reportsEmpty: You have not submitted any reports yet.

subscription.nativeRestoreHint: Reinstalled the app? Use Restore purchases in the mobile app after signing in.
subscription.demoBillingManage: This tier is active without a payment provider (development / demo). You can reset to Free below.

messages.aiTemplates: Templates when no API key is set.
messages.suggestionsHeading: Tap a suggestion to paste into your message
messages.emptyThread: Say hi — a short YouMe coach note may appear when you match (and loads in real time).
messages.errorForbidden: You are not part of this match.
messages.confirmBlock: Block this person? They will disappear from Discover and you will not be able to message each other.
messages.reportReasonPrompt: Report reason (HARASSMENT, SPAM, SCAM, INAPPROPRIATE_CONTENT, UNDERAGE, OTHER)
messages.reportSuccess: Report submitted. Thanks for helping keep YouMe safe.

reportModal.title: Report this person
reportModal.lead: Tell us what happened. Our team reviews reports confidentially.
reportModal.leadNamed: Report {{name}}. Our team reviews reports confidentially.
reportModal.detailsPlaceholder: What happened? Include anything that helps us review.

center.title: Help Center
center.subtitle: Answers for first-time users — likes, matches, safety, and your account.
center.searchPlaceholder: Search help… e.g. Super Like, match, report
center.noResults: No articles match your search. Try “Like” or “match”, or ask the assistant below.
center.resumeOnboarding: New to YouMe? Take a 1-minute tour.

like.title: Like
like.desc: Show interest — match if they like you too.

superLike.title: Super Like
superLike.desc: Stand out with a stronger signal.

match.title: Matching
match.desc: What happens when you both like each other.

discoverPass.title: Pass (✕)
discoverPass.body: Skip this profile. They won’t be notified, and you may see them again later depending on filters.

discoverLike.title: Like (♥)
discoverLike.body: Send a Like to show interest. If they Like you back, it’s a match — then you can message.

discoverSuper.title: Super Like (★)
discoverSuper.body: Super Like is stronger than a regular Like. Use it when someone really stands out — they’re more likely to notice you.

discoverSettings.title: Discovery settings
discoverSettings.body: Adjust age, distance, and who you see. If the deck runs empty, try widening distance or age here.

profileVerification.title: Profile photos & verification
profileVerification.body: Use clear photos of your face. Verified badges are coming soon — good photos help you match now.

welcome.title: Welcome to YouMe
welcome.body: We help you meet people nearby with respect and clarity. This short tour explains the basics — you can replay it anytime from Help.

matching.title: How matching works
matching.body: Browse profiles on Discover. When you both tap Like, it’s a match. Then head to Messages to chat.

likes.title: Like vs Super Like
likes.body: ♥ Like = interest. ★ Super Like = stronger signal so you stand out. ✕ Pass = skip without notifying them.

safety.title: Stay safe
safety.body: Meet in public for first dates. Use Report or Block from chat if someone makes you uncomfortable. Safety tools are in your Profile.

profile.title: A great profile
profile.body: Add clear photos and a short bio. Discovery settings control who you see — widen filters if you run out of profiles.

ai.title: YouMe coach (optional)
ai.body: AI tips can help with your profile or conversation ideas. Your plan controls daily limits — never required to enjoy the app.

ai.title: Ask YouMe
ai.lead: Short answers about how the app works. We don’t read your private chats.
ai.placeholder: e.g. What’s the difference between Like and Super Like?
ai.error: Could not get an answer. Try the articles above.
ai.noAnswer: Check the FAQ articles above, or contact support.
ai.signInRequired: Sign in to use the assistant. FAQ articles above work without an account.

contact.title: Contact support
contact.body: Still stuck? Email us — include your account email and a short description.

what_is_like.title: What is Like?
what_is_like.summary: Show interest with the heart button.
what_is_like.body:
Like (♥) tells someone you’re interested.

If they Like you back, YouMe creates a match and you can message each other.

If they don’t Like you back, they won’t be notified of your Like (standard dating-app behavior).

You can review people you liked under the Likes tab.

what_is_super_like.title: What is Super Like?
what_is_super_like.summary: A stronger signal than a regular Like.
what_is_super_like.body:
Super Like (★) is for when someone really stands out.

It’s a stronger signal than a regular Like — they’re more likely to notice you in their list.

Use it thoughtfully; saving Super Likes for people you’re genuinely excited about works best.

Matching still requires mutual interest — Super Like doesn’t force a match.

how_matching_works.title: How does matching work?
how_matching_works.body:
You match when you and another person both Like each other.

After a match, the conversation opens in Messages. A short YouMe coach note may appear to help break the ice.

Passes (✕) skip someone without notifying them.

after_match.title: What happens after matching?
after_match.summary: Chat in Messages and take it at your pace.
after_match.body:
Open Messages to find your match.

Say hello — short, friendly messages work well.

You can unmatch or block from the chat menu if you’re not comfortable.

Meet in public for first dates and tell a friend your plans.

boosts.title: How do boosts work?
boosts.body:
Boost-style features (when available on your plan) temporarily increase how often your profile is shown.

Exact limits depend on your subscription tier — see Upgrade in Profile.

Boosts don’t change matching rules: mutual Likes are still required.

profile_visibility.title: Profile visibility & Discovery settings
profile_visibility.summary: Control who you see and how you appear.
profile_visibility.body:
Discovery settings (filter icon on Discover) control age range, distance, and filters.

Your profile photos and bio are what others see on Discover.

Sharing approximate location helps distance labels — you control this in Discovery settings and Profile.

report_block.title: Report & block
report_block.summary: Tools in chat and Safety center.
report_block.body:
Block: removes someone from Discover and stops messaging both ways.

Report: flags behavior to our team (harassment, spam, scams, etc.).

Use the ⋮ menu in a chat or visit Safety in Profile to review blocks and reports.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.summary: What we show and what stays private.
privacy.body:
Your exact messages are private to the match.

We don’t translate your chat or profile text into another language automatically — what you write is what others see.

Read our Privacy Policy during registration for full details.

subscription.title: Subscription plans
subscription.body:
Free includes core Discover, likes, and messaging.

Plus and Gold add AI coach limits, insights, and premium perks — see Upgrade in Profile.

You can manage billing through the upgrade flow; cancel anytime per store or Stripe rules.

delete_account.title: Delete my account
delete_account.body:
Go to Profile → Account & security → Delete account.

This permanently removes your account and data from YouMe.

This cannot be undone. Download anything you want to keep before deleting.

beginner_guide.title: Beginner guide
beginner_guide.body:
1. Complete your profile with 2+ photos and a bio.
2. On Discover: ✕ pass, ♥ like, ★ super like.
3. Check Likes to see who liked you.
4. Message matches in Messages.
5. Adjust Discovery settings if you run out of profiles.

safety_guide.title: Safety guide
safety_guide.body:
Never send money to someone you met on YouMe.

Meet in public places for first dates.

Tell a friend where you’re going.

Use Block and Report if something feels wrong.

Visit Safety in Profile to manage blocks and see your reports.

profile_verification.title: Profile verification (coming soon)
profile_verification.summary: How to prepare your profile now.
profile_verification.body:
YouMe will offer photo verification so matches know you’re real.

For now: use recent photos, show your face clearly, avoid heavy filters.

Add at least 2 photos in Photos — verification will use your main photo when it launches.

Never share verification codes or passwords with anyone.
